raw_text: Among those who have only recently obtained a regular driver’s license, only drivers who lack confidence in their driving display the novice driver sign; confident drivers are not required to display it.

When a pedestrian is crossing at or near an intersection without a designated crosswalk, drivers must slow down, stop, or take other necessary precautions to avoid obstructing the pedestrian’s crossing.
If passengers are entering or exiting a streetcar, the driver must remain stopped until all individuals have crossed the roadway, whether or not a safety zone exists.
